name_en: (Prada) Underarm Moon/Crescent Bag Fashion Dark Horse[Victory] Calfskin with scattered letter gold hardware, deer pattern paired with fashion crocodile🐊pattern, more stylish. The crescent shape has a self-adjusting buckle, overall leather chain, can be sweet or salty. Shows elegance with a touch of retro. Side buckles can instantly turn it into a cute hula hoop, unlocking multi-use.
